filtered_yy3$StreamName <- NA  # Initialize the column with NA

# Iterate through each row of xx and update the StreamName in yy
for (i in 1:nrow(captures_output)) {
  individual_id <- captures_output$IndividualID[i]
  sampling_date <- captures_output$SamplingDate[i]
  stream_name <- captures_output$StreamName[i]
  
  # Find the corresponding rows in yy
  filtered_yy3[filtered_yy3$IndividualID == individual_id & filtered_yy3$CaptureDate == sampling_date, \StreamName\"] <- stream_name
